name: FOSSA
description: Monitor FOSSA open source license compliance and vulnerability scanning for project security and policy enforcement

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to FOSSA at https://app.fossa.com
2. Go to Settings > API Tokens (or Account Settings > API)
3. Click 'Generate Token' or 'Add Token'
4. Copy the generated token and paste it below

checks.name: Secure Code - Project Scanning
checks.description: Verifies that projects are actively being scanned by FOSSA and have recent analysis results

checks.name: Sanitized Inputs - License Compliance Policies
checks.description: Verifies that FOSSA license compliance policies are configured to enforce approved open source usage

checks.name: Publish Policies - Open Source Usage Policies
checks.description: Verifies that open source usage policies exist in FOSSA to govern how open source components are used across projects
